results.body: What is aTikTokInfluencer? ATikTokinfluencer is a content creator with a large following who produces 15-60-second-long entertaining and/or promotional videos — similar to Vines, in terms of format — on the popular video-focused social networking platform,TikTok. Some examples ofTikTokcontent include dance videos, makeup tutorials, workout routines, nutrition andfitnesstips ...
